tagline: Pools and Gardens for Fine Homes

hero.headline:
Luxury Pools Designed by Award-Winning
Architects
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be a masterpiece, not an afterthought. Harold Leidner's licensed Landscape Architects design and build breathtaking pools, spas, and outdoor environments for the finest homes in Dallas-Fort Worth. One team from concept to completion.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Exterior Design<br class="hidden md:block"> for Distinguished Homes
services.subtitle: From custom pools and elegant gardens to outdoor kitchens and recreation courts, our licensed Landscape Architects handle every detail of your property's transformation.

cards.title: Custom Pools & Spas
cards.description: Designed and built entirely in-house by licensed Landscape Architects. New pool construction, pool remodeling, spa installations, and ongoing concierge pool maintenance.

cards.title: Water Features & Fountains
cards.description: Sophisticated water elements from serene bubbling pots and koi ponds to dramatic fountains, waterfalls, and natural boulder features that elevate your landscape.

cards.title: Outdoor Structures
cards.description: Custom-designed gazebos, covered patios, pool cabanas, pavilions, pergolas, louvered roofs, greenhouses, and orangeries built to complement your home's architecture.

cards.title: Outdoor Recreation
cards.description: Premium tennis courts, pickleball courts, putting greens, bocce ball areas, outdoor fireplaces, and custom play areas designed for your family's lifestyle.

cards.title: Custom Garden Design
cards.description: Artistically designed gardens in modern, formal, xeriscaping, and tropical styles. Mature tree acquisition and expert garden maintenance included.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Lighting
cards.description: Custom paving, retaining walls, drainage solutions, landscape lighting, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and perimeter walls and gates crafted with lasting materials.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Reality in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Meet with a licensed Landscape Architect at your home. We listen to your goals, study your property, and present design concepts that capture your lifestyle and aesthetic.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: The same architects who design your project oversee every phase of construction. Our integrated design-build model ensures total accountability and no detail is lost in translation.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Estate
steps.description: Step into a transformed property that exceeds your expectations. Our Concierge Maintenance program keeps every element pristine so you simply enjoy the result for years to come.

about.label: Why Dallas Trusts Harold Leidner
about.headline: The Architects Who Design It, Build It
about.description: For over 40 years, Harold Leidner Landscape Architects has been the leading landscape architecture firm in Dallas-Fort Worth. Founded by Harold Leidner, a Texas A&M-trained landscape architect and Dallas native, we pioneered the integrated design-build philosophy: the designers who conceive your exterior should be the ones who build it. From Preston Hollow estates to Westlake retreats, our total accountability approach has earned features in Architectural Digest and Southern Living, and the trust of the most distinguished homeowners in North Texas.

features.title: Licensed Landscape Architects
features.description: Every designer and project manager holds a Registered Landscape Architect certification. Your project is led by credentialed professionals, not salespeople.

features.title: Integrated Design-Build Model
features.description: One team from first sketch to final walkthrough. No handoffs, no miscommunication, no finger-pointing. Total accountability on every project.

features.title: Concierge Maintenance Program
features.description: Our relationship does not end at completion. Personalized long-term maintenance keeps your landscape, pool, and outdoor spaces in pristine condition year-round.

pricing.headline: Investment-Grade Design. Transparent Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-scoped to your property and vision. We provide detailed proposals with no hidden fees and no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Total Accountability" Promise
guarantee.description: Because the same team that designs your project also builds it, there is never a gap between vision and execution. If any element of your finished project does not meet the standards we agreed upon, we make it right at our expense. That is the Harold Leidner difference.

faqs.question: How does the design-build process work?
faqs.answer: It starts with an on-site consultation where a licensed Landscape Architect studies your property and discusses your vision. We then create detailed design concepts, refine them with your feedback, and once approved, the same team builds every element. This integrated approach eliminates miscommunication and ensures total accountability.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines depend on scope. A pool and patio project typically runs 8-16 weeks from design approval to completion. Larger estate-scale projects with multiple elements may take 4-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the proposal phase and keep you updated throughout.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool maintenance after construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Concierge Maintenance program provides ongoing care for your pool, landscape, and outdoor structures. This includes cleaning, seasonal services, and proactive upkeep so your investment stays pristine for years.

faqs.question: What areas of Dallas-Fort Worth do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Dallas, Highland Park, University Park, Preston Hollow, Fort Worth, Westover Hills, Westlake, Carrollton, and communities throughout the greater DFW metroplex. With offices in Highland Park, Carrollton, and Fort Worth, we are never far from your project.

faqs.question: Are your designers actually licensed architects?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every designer and project manager at Harold Leidner holds a Professional Landscape Architect (PLA) or Registered Landscape Architect (RLA) certification. We also have Texas Master Certified Nursery Professionals and Licensed Irrigation Technicians on staff.

testimonials.name: Troy A.
testimonials.text: Very pleased with our experience with Harold Leidner and his landscape team. We have used their services on our last two homes, and we would absolutely use them again if the opportunity presented itself. Consistent excellence every time.

testimonials.name: John & Mrs. C.
testimonials.text: Harold transformed our 2+ acres in Preston Hollow from an overgrown lot into a lush and beautiful English garden that exceeded our expectations. The attention to detail and artistry was beyond anything we imagined.

testimonials.name: Ryan M.
testimonials.text: Exceptional job from start to finish. They handled turf, sprinklers, new plants, pool, outdoor kitchen, driveway, and patio tile. They kept us updated throughout with any changes. This is a truly professional company.
